verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a soluble protein lacking a transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or any mechanism for cell-surface anchoring. It is localized to the intra-acrosomal compartment of sperm—an intracellular secretory compartment—and is not accessible from the extracellular face. Although it participates in sperm-egg fusion signaling as an intracellular complex partner, the protein body itself does not reach the plasma membrane outer leaflet by any documented mechanism.
